folio.label: 99r
folio.l: If by his wyues chere , he mygút se
Or by hire word , a ¹ceyue that she
Were chaunged , but he neuäe coude hire fynde
But euäe in oon , I lyke , sad and kynde
¢ As glad as humble , as bysy in seruyce
And eke in loue , as she was wont to be
Was she to hi~ , in euäy maner wyse
Ne of hire dougúter , nougút a word spak she
Noon accident , for noon aduäsite
Was seen in hire , ne neuäe hire dougúter name
Ne nempned she , in ernest ne in game
¢ In this estate , there passed ben foure ©ere
Er she w childe was , but as god wolde
A knaue child she bar , be this wautere
Ful gcious , and fair for to beholde
And whan that folk , it to his fader tolde
Nat oonly he , but al his contree merye
Was for this child , and god they thanke & heyeheryeherye double check this correction/ODR/
¢ Whan it was two ©er olde , and fro the breste
De¹tid of his norice , vp on a day
This Markys caugút ©et , a nother lyste
To tempte his wyf , ©et oftere if he may
O nedlees , was she tempted in assay
¢ But wedded men , ne knowe no mesure

note.notetxt: 622There is a paragraph mark with a Nota in the left margin.Est

folio.l: Whan that they fynde , a pacient creature
¢ Wyf q¶ this Markys , ©e han herd or this
My peeple sekerly , beren oure mariage
And namely , sithen my sone , I born~ is
Now is it werse , than euäe in al oure age
The murmur sleetú myn herte , & myn corage
For to myn Eres , cometú the voys so smerte
That it wol ny , destroyed hatú myn herte
¢ Now sey they thus , whan wauter is a goon
Than shal the blode , of Ianicle succede
And be oure lord , for other han we noon
Swicú wordes seyn my peeple , it is no drede
Wel ougút I , of swicú murmur take hede
For certeynly , I drede , swicú sentence
Thougú they nou©t pleyne & speke , in myn audience
¢ I wolde lyue in pees , if that I mygút
Wherfore , I am disposed , vtterly
As I his suster , serued be nygút
Rigút so thynke I , to serue hi~ preuyly
This warne I ©ow , for ©e nat sodeynly
Out of ©oure selue , for no woo shulde outraye
